name: Gunslinger-class-and-weapons-with-bullets
description: This repository is for a Gunner class i liked from 'Zamans guide to the end of time (and how to fix it) all credits go to them and I've turned it into a repository for everyone to use. Please forgive any weird typos or anything as I hand typed it all and changed some names of things and such. Please support 'Zamans guide to the end of time'
